top_signals.title: New Hedge Funds Are Using AI Bots to Rival Industry Giants
top_signals.summary: Advances in artificial intelligence are leveling the field for fund managers, making it easier for boutique firms to compete with big macro and bond investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Asian banks help lift Japan Inc's syndicated loans to record high
Has Brexit been a success? It’s too early to tell
top_signals.summary: Ten years ago today the country woke to the news that the UK had voted to leave the European Union. Campaigners for Remain were horrified, pro-Brexit activists were jubilant, markets were panicked and in Westminster the Prime Minister, David Cameron, resigned. The magnitude of the Leave campaign’s victory – of their achievement – was sinking [...]
